name: blotterbook
description: Blotterbook tooling + build (ADR-001 / A26). Vite builds the static site + the /app/ surface into dist/ (the Cloudflare Pages output dir); dependencies are minimal/pinned/audited (guardrail A28) and the local-compute pillar is hard (no telemetry/egress). Dev-only tooling (ESLint/Prettier/Playwright) came in R19 Tier A.

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: node scripts/test-adapters.mjs && node scripts/test-auth.mjs && node scripts/test-version.mjs && node scripts/test-flags.mjs && node scripts/test-tax.mjs && node scripts/test-demostore.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/build-includes.mjs && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs && vite build && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
